name: Suspicious Code Page Switch Detected
description: Detection of a code page switch in a command line or batch script to a rare language. Adversaries may use a code page switch to obfuscate their commands and evade security defenses, which is a common defense evasion technique.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a process, **{image}**, was executed with a command line that switched the code page to an unusual language: **{command}**. This is a strong indicator of **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1140**), where an adversary is attempting to obfuscate a malicious command to bypass security controls. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious process. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The process image that was executed.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed with the code page switch.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
